cross_slice_decision_coverage: architecture and method decisions are linked before implementation
experience_trace: Product Experience refs are mapped when visible surfaces exist
security_trace: security architecture or explicit non-applicability is recorded
capability_pack_trace: required packs are ready or blocked
access_and_secret_trace: required access is granted or blocked before execution
proof_coverage: work units include verification commands and expected results
allowed_next_actions: execute ready work units without changing canonical Product SOT scope
forbidden_next_actions: claim complete product done from one bounded slice
